allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''selfsigned''\); const pems = s.generate\([{name:''commonName'',value:''test''}], {days:365,keySize:2048}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(pems\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''selfsigned''\); const pems = s.generate\([{name:''commonName'',value:''test''}], {days:365,keySize:2048}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(pems, null, 2\).substring\(0, 500\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''selfsigned''\); console.log\(typeof s.generate\); const result = s.generate\([{name:''commonName'',value:''test''}], {days:365, keySize:2048}, function\(err, pems\) { console.log\(''callback keys:'', Object.keys\(pems\)\); console.log\(''cert length:'', pems.cert?.length\); console.log\(''private length:'', pems.private?.length\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const s = require\(''selfsigned''\); s.generate\([{name:''commonName'',value:''test''}], {days:365, keySize:2048}, function\(err, pems\) { if\(err\) console.log\(''err:'', err\); else { console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(pems\)\); console.log\(''cert:'', pems.cert?.substring\(0,50\)\); } }\);")
